title: How to register - Canada.ca
content:
You can register for a payroll account using different methods.
Where possible, you should use the Canada Revenue Agency online services to register for a payroll account. This is the quickest way to register and avoid delays that may occur in processing paper requests.
Register using one of the following online services if you are:
- Canadian resident business Register using: Business Registration Online

#### Canadian resident business
Business Registration Online
- Non-resident business Register using: Non-resident business registration

#### Non-resident business
Non-resident business registration
Learn more about other ways to register:
- For residents with a Canadian business
- For non-residents doing business in Canada

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
